sections.paragraph:
Original: יעבּץ

Transliteration: ya‛bêts

Phonetic: yah-bates'

BDB Definition:

Jabez = "sorrow"
  1. the head of a Calebite family (noun proper masculine)
  2. a town in Judah apparently near Bethlehem (noun proper locative)

Origin: from an unused root probably meaning to grieve

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
